mapper.insert: insert into app.advisor_product_review (product_id, product_version_id, reviewer_id, result, comment) values (#{productId}, #{productVersionId}, #{reviewerId}, #{result}, #{comment})
mapper.select: select r.result as result, r.comment as comment, u.nickname as reviewerName, r.reviewed_at as reviewedAt from app.advisor_product_review r inner join app.sys_user u on u.id = r.reviewer_id where r.product_id = #{productId} order by r.reviewed_at desc, r.id desc
